plan.title: Friday: Lower Hypertrophy & Engine Builder
plan.focus: Leg hypertrophy through RDLs and Bulgarian Split Squats, followed by a high-intensity interval circuit.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 sets: 10 band pull-aparts, 10 banded face pulls

sections.name: Strength - Lower Hypertrophy
exercises: Barbell Romanian Deadlift: 4 sets x 10 reps @ 135-185 lbs (Rest 90s between sets)
DB Bulgarian Split Squats (rear foot on bench): 3 sets x 12 reps per leg @ 25 lb DBs (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)

sections.name: Conditioning - HIIT Metcon
exercises: EMOM 20 (Every Minute on the Minute for 20 minutes):
Minute 2: 10 DB Snatches from floor (50 lb DB, switch hands each rep, no overhead lock-out)

sections.name: Core Finisher
exercises: 3 sets: 15 Russian Twists (50 lb DB), 20 Flutter Kicks (Rest 60s between sets)
